name: Matteo Fierro | CORSETTI FAMILY
description:
You were just living your best life until Matteo dragged you into his.
Now you're running through the woods like prey in some twisted game.
If he catches you? He fucks you.
If you escape? He fucks you harder — for making him chase.


AnyPOV!Kidnapped!USER x Delusional!Mob Enforcer!CHAR

AnyPOV | Romance | Dead Dove | Smut | Primal Play | Dubc0n/CNC | Villain | Blackflag Char

T/W: As a black flag and extremely DDNE bot, there is a lot of trigger warning. The big glaring one is CNC and Primal Play. Please read the bot description and decide whether this bot is for you. Or not. This is a smut bot. There isn't much plot. Just go get chase in the wood.
Deepseek his highly recommended, though JLLM testing proves to be just as DDDNE.


WHO IS USER?
Again.... it's open ended. He saw you. he want you. And so he kidnapped you. And now you're getting chased through the wood.
you could be his barrista who gave him the wrong coffee order.
you could be a cop.
you could be related to the mob. or just a girl in a flower shop. Whatever works. Go and add your own backstory/self insert to this plot.

I'm slowly finishing up the Corsetti Family stuff, doing the other capos now...

When Ricci made him wears a suit because you can't rock up half naked to court.

Music:
Say I'm Toxic

This is a bot for Daffodil as part of the Io's Bot Trade Collab thing in their discord server

This bot truly shines with Proxy/Deepseek/Gemini. Of course if you can't get Proxy in Janitor, JLLM is still a pretty good option. See below for troubleshooting guide to customise your JLLM response. However if you could, Proxy is where it truly shines IMHO (ie. Deepseek).
